sections.short-biography: Laid down every curse he could think of on Gongsun Zan’s head.

full_text:
Sun Jin
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Jin. Laid down every curse he could think of on Gongsun Zan’s head. Sun Jin was affiliated with Liu Yu. Sun Jin lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
